query: UPDATE project_cash_flow_settings SET lump_sum_month = 3, start_month = 3, end_month = 3 WHERE project_id IN ('3','4','5') AND section = 'offplan' AND distribution_method = 'lump_sum' AND lump_sum_month > 4;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute UPDATE project_cash_flow_settings SET lump_sum_month = 3, start_month = 3, end_month = 3 WHERE project_id IN ('3','4','5') AND section = 'offplan' AND distribution_method = 'lump_sum' AND lump_sum_month > 4;
